text:
Shin Japan Heroes Universe is a collaborative project between ', Shin Evangelion, ', and '. This project was launched by Toho, khara, Tsuburaya Productions, and Toei. From the connection of the works with "Shin" in the title which the creator Hideaki Anno participates, the dream collaboration of 4 "heroes" representing Japan has been realized beyond the boundaries of the companies.

Shin Godzilla (2016)
Shin Evangerion Gekijōban:|| (2021)
Shin Ultraman (2022)
Shin Kamen Rider (2023)
